case_title: MEREL P. GLAUBIGER VS. CARPET CONTRACTORS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF MEREL P. GLAUBIGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS, INC, IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICK DEMETRIES BOTAITIS. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $492.00 FILED BY GLAUBIGER, MEREL P. AS TO DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED AUG-22-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLAUBIGER, MEREL P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS, INC. $492.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $572.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS, INC.
